title: Formentera Partners on Oil Markets, Iran War Impact
summary: Bryan Sheffield, Managing Partner at Formentera Partners, discusses the impact from the Iran war and outlook for the energy market. He speaks with Paul Allen from the sidelines of the Australian Energy Producers Conference in Adelaide.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesia Kicks Off Latest Foreign Bond Sale as Pressure Builds
summary: Indonesia started marketing its latest dollar bond offering Tuesday and flagged that a euro-denominated tranche may follow when London markets open, as the Iran conflict stokes concerns about the nation’s economic vulnerability.
